## Checklist

Before submitting, confirm all of the following:

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md` in full
- [ ] My branch is named `submission/<my-full-name>`
- [ ] I am opening this PR against `main` on the upstream `17quantum` repo — not my fork
- [ ] All exercises run without errors
- [ ] I have removed all debug statements and commented-out code
- [ ] I have not looked at the `solution` branch before submitting
- [ ] This is my own work
